content: Unit testing concurrent Tasks on @MainActor: the existing AppStateTests pattern (waitUntil polling loop with Task.sleep) works for async state machine tests. For jobs model tests: inject slow onRunIssueFiling stubs (Task.sleep(.milliseconds(300))) to observe intermediate .filing state; await waitUntil { jobs.count == N && jobs[N-1].state == .done }. Two-concurrent-jobs test: start two transcription cycles back-to-back while first filing is in-flight, verify jobs.count == 2 and captureState == .idle after each transcription. The injection seams (onRunIssueFiling, onSpeak) decouple the test from real async I/O — stubs return deterministic results without actual CLI subprocess.
